corrections.note: Siglum is A with superscript 'a' (Aa), not plain A.

uncertain.note: Image appears to show lowercase 'ὁ' rather than the capital 'Ὁ' in the transcription; could also be a typographic rendering of the small capital.
Unclear whether printed form is 'μακράν ἔστιν' (both accented) or the enclitic form given in transcription.
Possible 'B' siglum between 'απεστην' and 'ℵc.a' not captured in transcription; hard to confirm at this resolution.

uncertain.location: v. 27 siglum tail '(υπ ℵc.a) A ℵAC'
uncertain.note: The cluster 'A ℵAC' is unusual; could be 'A BℵAC' or similar, but image is ambiguous.
